stockMarket.summary: Asian markets plunged on April 2, 2026, as geopolitical tensions escalated following US President Donald Trump's address signaling potential military action against Iran, cooling peace hopes. Oil prices surged on supply disruption concerns, while gold and silver declined.
notableMoves: South Korea's KOSPI fell 4.35%-5.55%, triggering sidecars.
Oil prices (Brent crude) rose 4.8%-7% to nearly $108/barrel.
Precious metals faced downward pressure: Gold down ~2-4%, Silver down ~4.9-7.3%.

exhibitions: Matisse's Jazz: Rhythms in Color (Art Institute of Chicago)
